zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hervey Sr於1408年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾瑟利時，他的父親John Hervey III48歲，母親Margaret Parles Hervey40歲。他與Jane de Paston結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1475年在他的家鄉享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Harvey  .

variants.name: Harvey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English personal name Hervei, also found as Herveu, Hervé, and Hervi. The name Herveu or Herv(e)i was borne by a number of Bretons at the Norman Conquest and, as such, represents a French form of the Old Breton name Hoiearnviu or Hærviu (see Herve ). Among Normans Herve(i) or Herv(e)i was also a French form of ancient Germanic Hariwic, Herewic (from hari ‘army’ + wīg ‘war’), with intervocalic /w/ becoming /v/ in Old French. The Breton and ancient Germanic names were commonly Latinized as Herve(i)us and Hervic(i)us respectively but, since their most common vernacular forms in Old French were indistinguishable, the Latin forms were also sometimes interchangeable, especially Herveus.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAirmheadhaigh ‘descendant of Airmheadhach’, a personal name probably meaning ‘esteemed’. It seems to be a derivative of Airmheadh, the name borne by a mythological physician.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchaidh ‘descendant of Earchadh’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hervey Sr was born in 1408, in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hervey III, was 48 and his mother, Margaret Parles Hervey, was 40. He married Jane de Paston. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hervey Sr est né en 1408, à Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hervey III, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Margaret Parles Hervey, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Jane de Paston. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hervey Sr 1408 in Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hervey III 48 und seine Mutter Margaret Parles Hervey 40. Er hat Jane de Paston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1475 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hervey Sr è nato il nel 1408 nel Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Hervey III, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Parles Hervey, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Jane de Paston. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1475, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hervey Sr(이)가 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hervey III(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Parles Hervey(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Jane de Paston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hervey Sr nasceu em 1408, em Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hervey III, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Parles Hervey, tinha 40 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hervey Sr родился в 1408 г. в местности турлиг, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Hervey III было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Parles Hervey, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane de Paston. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1475 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Hervey Sr nació en 1408, en Thurleigh, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hervey III, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Margaret Parles Hervey, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Jane de Paston. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1475, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
